creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Oleksandr Tymoshenko from comment #1)

Apologies, should have clarified/been explicit:

Merge account in bug 232551 comment 2 into account in bug 232551 comment 3

Maintainer (CC'd) appears to have some other accounts too. It would be a good opportunity to merge those while we're here, if they would like.
